supervisor_meta.general_notes: `gemini-flash` failed to extract any rows for this page. All extractions and subsequent processing were based solely on `gpt-5-mini`'s output and direct visual verification against the image. 'rows_by_note_assessment' counts rows where `gpt-5-mini`'s numerical values were accepted, and its notes (specific or generic) either confirmed the reading or highlighted ambiguity that aligned with visual inspection. 'rows_by_visual_override' counts rows where a significant correction (primarily to description text) was made based on direct visual comparison to the image, even if `gpt-5-mini`'s amounts were correct.
